## Test Summary

| Story | Type | Gate | Required evidence | Planned test / evidence target |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| BOND-DATA-001 | Logic + Integration | BLOCKING | Bond pair key stability, thresholds, serialization, old-save default | `tests/unit/bond/bond_data_model_test.gd`; `tests/integration/bond/affinity_event_hooks_test.gd` |
| BOND-EVT-001 | Integration | BLOCKING | Deterministic affinity gain event, clamp, save/load after event | `tests/integration/bond/affinity_event_hooks_test.gd`; verify `GameEvents` signal contract |
| EQUIP-ENH-001 | UI + Integration | ADVISORY + BLOCKING | Character equipment tab enhancement panel, +1 to +5 path, SaveData writeback | `tests/integration/ui/character_management_test.gd`; packaged smoke +5 path |
| EQUIP-ENH-002 | Logic + Integration | BLOCKING | Cost source from inventory/economy, shortage messaging, risk-zone disabled for +6+ | `tests/unit/equipment/enhancement_test.gd`; `tests/integration/ui/character_management_test.gd` |
| BASE-AP-001 | Logic + Integration + UI | BLOCKING + ADVISORY | AP model, chapter reset, training consumes 1 AP, save round-trip, top bar display | `tests/unit/base/action_points_test.gd`; `tests/integration/ui/base_hub_test.gd` extension; save round-trip test |
| BOND-UI-001 | UI + Integration | ADVISORY + BLOCKING | Character detail top-3 bond summary, localized empty state, dense-state responsiveness | `tests/integration/ui/character_management_test.gd` extension; screenshot optional |
| EQUIP-ENH-003 | UI + Integration | ADVISORY + BLOCKING | Toast/hint behavior, +5 round-trip, failure state messaging | `tests/integration/ui/character_management_test.gd`; packaged smoke `base_enhanced_level:5` |
| BASE-INTEL-001 | UI + Config/Data | ADVISORY | Intel tab routing, current chapter briefing, next battle preview from data | `tests/integration/ui/base_hub_test.gd` extension; config parse sanity for chapter data |
| ECON-CFG-001 | Config/Data + Documentation | ADVISORY | Base upgrade cost table exists, schema consistent with ADR-008, no runtime UI required | `assets/data/economy/base-upgrade-costs.json`; check-only and diff checks |
| CH3-DESIGN-001 | Documentation | ADVISORY | Full eight-section Ch.3 GDD, concrete battle 1 layout/enemies/B3-GATE conditions | `design/gdd/chapter-03.md` review checklist; no runtime tests |
| GOV-001 | Documentation | ADVISORY | Sprint status, epic index, manifest/control updates are synchronized | `production/sprint-status.yaml`; `production/epics/index.md`; `docs/architecture/control-manifest.md` if changed |
| TECH-001 | Regression hardening | BLOCKING only for touched feature | Negative tests around Bond duplicate pairs, +0 enhancement, AP exhaustion | New tests must be listed in `tests/tests_manifest.txt` and pass in GUT runner |

## Blocking Automated Plan

Sprint-006 closure gate:

1. `GodotExe --headless --check-only project.godot`
2. `GodotExe --headless res://tests/test_runner.tscn`
3. `GodotExe --headless --export-release "Windows Desktop" builds/windows/SRPG.exe`
4. `builds/windows/SRPG.exe --headless --srpg-playthrough-smoke`

| `builds/windows/SRPG.exe --headless --srpg-playthrough-smoke` | PASS: `base_enhanced_level:5`, `bond_growth_present:true`, `camp_report_present:true` |
| Process launch smoke | PASS: exported exe still running after 5 seconds, then stopped locally |

## Story-Level Acceptance Gates

- Logic stories (`BOND-DATA-001`, `BASE-AP-001`, parts of `EQUIP-ENH-002`) cannot be marked done without automated unit tests.
- Integration stories (`BOND-EVT-001`, save/load, UI round-trip) cannot be marked done without GUT integration tests or a documented playtest accepted by QA.
- UI stories can use manual walkthrough evidence only for visual quality; functional flows still need interaction tests where possible.
- Documentation-only stories must reference the exact downstream implementation entry and list test candidates before implementation begins.

## Risks / QA Notes

- The largest prior blocker was missing Sprint-006 story files; those artifacts now exist and should go through `/story-readiness` before implementation.
- Existing `tests/unit/equipment/enhancement_test.gd` and `tests/unit/resource/consumption_costs_test.gd` cover core enhancement/resource formulas, but Sprint-006 still needs UI/save/cost-source integration coverage.
- Existing `tests/integration/ui/base_hub_test.gd` covers Sprint-004 base MVP; it must be extended, not replaced, for AP and Intel Room behavior.
- Packaged smoke currently validates the Chapter 1/base/management path. Add explicit Bond/equipment/base AP coverage only after those features exist.

## Next Steps

1. Sprint-007 can consume `design/gdd/chapter-03.md` and `assets/data/economy/base-upgrade-costs.json`.
2. Future Tavern/Bond dialogue and Base Upgrade UI remain explicit Sprint-007+ handoff items.
